ESTABLISHED IN VIJAYAWADA

REDISTRIBUTING POWER, DEFINING THE OG

OG FITNESS is not just another gym; it's a high-performance sanctuary. Designed for those who demand the finest training ecosystem, we blend sports science, imported Italian biomechanical gear, and high-energy luxury styling.

Our 5.0-star rating stands testimony to our commitment to hygiene, elite certification coaching, and absolute result transformation tracking. No shortcuts. Just relentless success.

Explore Programs

Certified Trainers

ISSA, ACE, and NASM expert instructors guiding every lift.

Premium Equipment

Imported biomechanic machines optimizing muscle engagement.

Personalized Plans

Custom tailored nutrition blueprints & workout programming.

Hygiene & Standards

Sterilized equipment, absolute luxury ventilation, safe space.

OUR SPECIALTIES

ELITE OG PROGRAMS

Scientifically curated workout regimes constructed to trigger extreme physical evolution.

Strength Training

Develop heavy lifts, muscle fiber density, and maximum power thresholds through progressive overload.

Learn More

Weight Loss

Torch stubborn fat using metabolic conditioning, calorie tracking, and dynamic heart rate control zones.

Learn More

Personal Training

One-on-one tailored focus with our master certified fitness instructors for accelerated growth.

Learn More

Cardio Training

Boost your VO2 max, cardiovascular threshold, stamina, and recovery capacity with top-tier gear.

Learn More

Functional Training

Improve athletic flexibility, core strength, joint stability, and daily structural movement mechanics.

Learn More

Nutrition Guidance

Custom macros breakdowns, nutrient timing, meal schedules, and targeted body fat composition metrics.

Learn More

CrossFit

High-intensity functional combinations. Olympic lifts, gymnastics, and raw cardiorespiratory blast.

Learn More

HIIT Training

Short explosive intervals triggering maximum metabolic burn and rapid cardiovascular response.

Learn More

Muscle Building

Hypertrophy optimized split programming, mechanical tension focus, and structural bulk strategies.

Learn More
THE LUXURY ADVANTAGE

WHY ELITES TRAIN AT OG FITNESS

We set the gold standard in physical prep. Over 5000+ members have transformed their health matrix inside our state-of-the-art facility.

5.0 Google Rating: Highest satisfaction metric.
Elite Certified Trainers: Real scientific credentials.
Prime Location: Heart of Vijayawada, easy reach.
High-Grade Safety: Premium air filtration & sanitization.

Certified Trainers

Personalized routines coached by certified experts.

Imported Equipment

High-end bio-mechanic gear imported from top brands.

Customized Workouts

Tailored schedules accommodating specific biological goals.

Flexible Memberships

Choose plans that blend into your professional timeline.

Transformation Tracking

Periodic body scans and metric reports check progress.

Diet Planning

Macro breakdowns and customized healthy recipes list.

Hygiene Standards

Rigorous multiple-times daily cleaning routines.

Smart Fitness Monitor

App-connected performance telemetry charts.

INVEST IN YOUR HEALTH

MEMBERSHIP PLAN MATRIX

Select the commitment plan that fits your high-performance ambitions.

Basic Plan

₹2,499/mo
  • Full Gym Floor Access
  • Lockers & Shower Access
  • Standard General Guidance
  • Cardio & Spin Classes
  • 1-on-1 Nutritionist Planning
  • Personal Trainer Allocation
MOST POPULAR

Elite Plan

₹7,999/mo
  • Unlimited Gym & Cardio Access
  • Elite Personal Training (3x/week)
  • Customized Nutrition blueprints
  • Priority Whatsapp & Coach Support
  • Monthly Bio-Scan & Metrics Logs
  • Group classes (Yoga, CrossFit, HIIT)

Premium Plan

₹4,499/mo
  • Full Gym Floor Access
  • Cardio Floor Access
  • Weekly CrossFit & Group Classes
  • Customized General Diet Plan
  • Personal Trainer Allocation
  • Priority Support Desk
PERFORMANCE TELEMETRY

INTERACTIVE BIOMETRIC CALCULATORS

Calculate your body parameters instantly and start aligning your nutrition metrics.

Your Body Mass Index

22.9

STATUS: NORMAL

Under Normal Over Obese

BMR (Base Calorie Burn)

1,620

Calories / Day

TDEE (Daily Calorie Needs to Maintain)

2,511

Calories / Day

Recommended Daily Water Intake

3.2

Liters / Day

(Approx. 13 glasses of 250ml)

Recommended Daily Protein Intake

140

Grams / Day

Equivalent to roughly 23 egg whites or 560g of cooked chicken breast.

WEEKLY MATRIX

WORKOUT SCHEDULER

Plan your training week effectively according to our scientific muscle split routines.

06:00 AM - 08:00 AM

Chest & Triceps Power Split

Flat Bench Press, Incline DB Press, Dips, Overhead Tricep extensions. Focus: Maximum load pushing.

HIGH INTENSITY Coach Vikram
10:00 AM - 11:30 AM

Cardio Metabolic Conditioning

LISS treadmill walks, incline climb, core matrix circuit.

MED INTENSITY Coach Priya
06:00 PM - 08:00 PM

Chest & Triceps Hypertrophy

DB Flyes, Cable pressdowns, skull crushers, chest press machine. Focus: Muscular volume pump.

HIGH INTENSITY Coach Arjun
06:00 AM - 08:00 AM

Back & Biceps Pull Split

Deadlifts, Lat pulldowns, Barbell rows, Hammer curls. Focus: Heavy posterior chain loads.

HIGH INTENSITY Coach Vikram
05:30 PM - 06:30 PM

Dynamic CrossFit WOD

Cleans, pull-ups, box jumps, rowing machine splits.

EXTREME Coach Priya
07:00 PM - 08:30 PM

Biceps & Lats Volumizer

Preacher curls, rope pull-overs, DB incline curls, face pulls.

MED INTENSITY Coach Arjun
07:00 AM - 08:30 AM

Active Mobility & Core Stability

Dynamic stretch matrices, foam rolling, yoga flows, core stability work.

LOW INTENSITY Coach Arjun
06:00 PM - 07:30 PM

High Intensity Interval Training (HIIT)

Sprints, battleropes, medicine ball slams, burpees.

HIGH INTENSITY Coach Priya
06:00 AM - 08:00 AM

Shoulders & Arms Blast

Overhead Press, Lateral raises, DB hammer curls, dips. Focus: Structural width.

HIGH INTENSITY Coach Vikram
06:30 PM - 08:30 PM

Hypertrophy Arms Split

Barbell bicep curls, tricep pushdowns, lateral cable raises.

MED INTENSITY Coach Arjun
06:00 AM - 08:30 AM

Lower Body Heavy Squats

Barbell squats, RDLs, leg press, lunges, calf press. Focus: Quad & glute strength.

EXTREME Coach Vikram
06:00 PM - 08:00 PM

Leg Hypertrophy & Calves

Leg extensions, hamstring curls, goblet squats, standing calf raises.

HIGH INTENSITY Coach Arjun
08:00 AM - 10:00 AM

CrossFit Athletic Conditioning

Clean and jerks, kettlebell swings, box jumps, assault bike sprints.

EXTREME Coach Priya
05:00 PM - 07:00 PM

Full Body Functional Power

Pullups, pushups, sled pushes, farmer walks. Focus: Real-world physical endurance.

HIGH INTENSITY Coach Vikram
ALL DAY

Absolute Rest & Muscle Repair

No workouts recommended. Take hot showers, focus on hydration, and complete macro meal logs. Sleep 8-10 hours to reconstruct muscle tissue.

RECOVERY DAY OG FITNESS Medical Board
VISUAL TOUR

THE OG MASONRY

Take a visual tour inside our luxury facility, high-end machines, and training events.

Luxury Gym Floor

Matte black plates, red neon lighting, custom sound system.

Imported Barbells

Precision-knurled olympic bars and steel plates.

Cardio Burnout Zone

Metabolic drills with high-density battle ropes.

Strength Showdown

Annual elite deadlift challenges and member showcases.

Dumbbell Rack Section

Precision weighted dumbbells ranging up to 60kg.

Bio-Cardio Deck

Premium treadmills overlooking the cityscape.

MEMBER VERDICT

WHAT THE OGs SAY

Review the verified 5.0-star feedback from our high-performance members.

"Hands down the best gym in Vijayawada! The environment feels super luxury and private. The coaches are certified and actually correct your posture during heavy sets. Absolute class!"

Suresh K.

Lost 12kg (Software Engineer)

"The imported biomechanic equipment here hits the target muscle completely different than ordinary gym gear. Clean, premium ventilation, and awesome dark branding!"

Monica R.

Gained Strength (Athlete)

"Absolutely love the high-energy red neon lighting. The music is perfect, and the crowds are highly professional. Joining the Elite package was the best investment I made."

Karthik V.

Shredded 8% Body Fat

"Hands down the best gym in Vijayawada! The environment feels super luxury and private. The coaches are certified and actually correct your posture during heavy sets. Absolute class!"

OG PLAN RECOMMENDER

Answer these 3 quick questions to discover your personalized training regimen.

2. How many days per week can you train?

3. What is your training experience level?
